exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.description: Classic bodyweight exercise for chest, shoulders, and triceps
exercises.instructions: ["Start in plank position","Lower body until chest nearly touches floor","Push back up to starting position"]

exercises.name: Deadlifts
exercises.instructions: ["Stand with barbell over mid-foot","Bend at hips and knees to grab bar","Stand up straight, pushing through heels"]

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: ["Stand with feet shoulder-width apart","Lower down as if sitting in a chair","Push through heels to return to standing"]

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Classic compound movement for chest, shoulders, and triceps
exercises.instructions: ["Lie flat on bench with feet firmly on floor","Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width","Lower bar to chest with control","Press bar up explosively to starting position"]

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.description: Bodyweight exercise for back and biceps
exercises.instructions: ["Hang from bar with overhand grip","Engage lats and pull body up","Chin over bar at top","Lower with control to full extension"]

exercises.name: Bent-Over Rows
exercises.description: Compound pulling movement for back thickness
exercises.instructions: ["Hinge at hips with slight knee bend","Hold barbell with overhand grip","Pull bar to lower chest/upper abdomen","Squeeze shoulder blades together"]

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.description: Standing shoulder press for deltoid development
exercises.instructions: ["Stand with feet shoulder-width apart","Hold barbell at shoulder level","Press overhead until arms are extended","Lower with control to starting position"]

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlifts
exercises.description: Hip-hinge movement targeting hamstrings and glutes
exercises.instructions: ["Stand with barbell in front of thighs","Push hips back while keeping chest up","Lower bar until you feel hamstring stretch","Drive hips forward to return to standing"]

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squats
exercises.description: Single-leg squat variation for leg strength and balance
exercises.instructions: ["Stand 2-3 feet in front of bench","Place rear foot on bench behind you","Lower into lunge position","Push through front heel to return to start"]

exercises.name: Hip Thrusts
exercises.description: Glute-focused exercise for posterior chain strength
exercises.instructions: ["Sit with upper back against bench","Place barbell across hips","Drive through heels to lift hips up","Squeeze glutes at top of movement"]

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: ["Start in push-up position on forearms","Keep body in straight line from head to heels","Engage core and glutes","Hold position for prescribed time"]

exercises.name: Russian Twists
exercises.instructions: ["Sit with knees bent, feet slightly off ground","Lean back to 45-degree angle","Rotate torso side to side","Keep chest up throughout movement"]

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flyes
exercises.instructions: ["Lie on bench with dumbbells in each hand","Start with arms extended above chest","Lower weights in wide arc with slight elbow bend","Squeeze chest to return to starting position"]

contactSubmissions.name: Jessica Martinez
contactSubmissions.message: Hi Brent! I saw your transformation posts on Instagram and I'm really interested in starting my fitness journey. I've struggled with consistency in the past and would love to work with a trainer who can help keep me accountable. What packages do you offer?

contactSubmissions.name: Carlos Rodriguez
contactSubmissions.message: Looking to build muscle and improve my strength. I have about 2 years of gym experience but feel like I've hit a plateau. Can you help me break through and optimize my training?

contactSubmissions.name: Amanda Thompson
contactSubmissions.message: I'm a busy mom of two and need help creating a sustainable fitness routine. I can only train 3 days a week max. Do you work with clients who have limited time availability?
